clips.note: aerial Nuremberg rally columns — packed beer-hall rallies / propaganda wing
vast flag-filled crowd — party districts / shadow state
officials at desk with documents — parallel party bureaucracy
women marching in formation — women's league / youth wings
soldiers marching in column — the S.A. under Roehm
Himmler in SS uniform (captioned) — Himmler handed the SS, 1929
industrial forge interior — 1929 crash / industry collapse
aircraft on field — chartered aircraft / private armies funded
Hitler speaking forcefully in open car — courting the generals
rally grandstand with swastika banners — Harzburg mass demonstration
Hitler motorcade through crowd — national campaign tour
assembled uniformed ranks, faces up — Berlin S.A. mobilized
Hitler with officers at ceremony — Day of Potsdam
uniformed ranks saluting — storm troopers lining the aisles
